## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is a young, AI-driven content marketing agency leveraging LLMs for client deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [The Technical Managing Editor role involves content editing, project management, and AI workflow optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Will has extensive content marketing experience, including AI integration and workflow automation](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Success metrics include client retention and ability to connect content performance with client goals](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview and Role Description

  - [GrowthX: \~1-year-old services agency delivering growth marketing content](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Uses internal AI platform (3 months old) leveraging LLMs for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Technical Managing Editor role:](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
      - [Core of delivery pods, managing 3-5 accounts](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
      - [Oversees 2-3 content managers](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
      - [Edits AI-generated content before client delivery](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Project management: ensuring 5 pieces/week align with scope](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
      - [Collaborates with account strategists on long-term goals](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
      - [Improves AI prompts and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)

### Will's Background and Experience

  - [10 years in content marketing, 5 years in B2B/B2C SaaS](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Worked at Animals (top content marketing agency) as manager and freelancer](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Current roles: content creator, strategist, writer (70-80% of work)](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Embraced AI integration in content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Developed low-code AI-powered workflows and automation tools](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Clients include impact.com (affiliate marketing) and Writer (AI writing tool)](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)

### AI in Content Creation

  - [Will prefers AI collaboration for quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Uses AI for drafting, editing, and refining content](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Frustrations: AI-generated content can be repetitive and formulaic](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Solution: Detailed input guidelines and specific prompts improve output quality](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)

### Role Success Metrics and Challenges

  - [Primary metric: Client retention](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Key skills: Analytical thinking, connecting content performance to client goals](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
  - [Challenge: Efficiently leveraging AI for editing 25+ pieces/week](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Successful editors refine AI prompts to reduce manual editing time (20-40 mins/piece)](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### GrowthX Tools and Processes

  - [Internal AI platform leveraging multiple models (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Claude used for secondary checks and post-processing editing](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Content types vary: long-form guides, glossaries, review pages](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)

### Company Growth and Challenges

  - [Rapid growth led to some hiring mismatches](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Evolving role from Managing Editor to Technical Managing Editor](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Focusing on scalability and efficiency to avoid overwork](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matthew Panzerino to review Will's test assignment](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [Feedback on interview and assignment to determine next steps](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Potential final round interview if feedback is positive](https://fathom.video/share/Pf6sJaHsfQqmh7sYNxNR2t6uXPyqZzyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
